description: Massive Knowledge Expansion + Autonomous Learning Loop - Expand MK's knowledge base to tens of thousands of facts across every domain. Add the autonomous learning loop that continuously grows knowledge during idle time. This is what makes MK get smarter every day.
steps: Create MK_OS/ai_core/hre/knowledge_files/bulk_crypto_trading.mk - 600+ facts about crypto trading strategies, candlestick patterns, order types, exchange mechanisms, DeFi protocols, yield farming, liquidity pools, tokenomics, market cycles, whale behavior, on-chain analysis

Create MK_OS/ai_core/hre/knowledge_files/bulk_linux_systems.mk - 500+ facts about Linux: kernel concepts, systemd, networking (iptables, nftables), filesystems (ext4, btrfs, zfs), containers (Docker, LXC), package managers, shell scripting, system administration, security (SELinux, AppArmor), process management

Create MK_OS/ai_core/hre/knowledge_files/bulk_networking.mk - 400+ facts about networking: TCP/IP, DNS, HTTP/HTTPS, SSH, TLS, VPN, firewall rules, subnetting, routing, load balancing, CDNs, WebSocket, MQTT, peer-to-peer protocols

Create MK_OS/ai_core/hre/knowledge_files/bulk_ai_ml.mk - 500+ facts about AI/ML: neural networks, transformers, training techniques, LLMs, embeddings, vector databases, RAG, fine-tuning, RLHF, diffusion models, GANs, reinforcement learning, computer vision, NLP

Create MK_OS/ai_core/hre/knowledge_files/bulk_hardware.mk - 400+ facts about computer hardware: CPUs (AMD Ryzen, Intel), GPUs (AMD, NVIDIA), RAM (DDR4/DDR5), storage (NVMe, SATA), motherboards, cooling systems, PSUs, benchmarking, overclocking, thermal management

Create MK_OS/ai_core/hre/knowledge_files/bulk_security_hacking.mk - 400+ facts about cybersecurity: encryption algorithms, common vulnerabilities (OWASP top 10), penetration testing tools, network security, malware types, social engineering, authentication methods, zero-trust architecture, incident response

Create MK_OS/ai_core/hre/knowledge_files/bulk_finance_economics.mk - 400+ facts about finance: stock markets, options, futures, bonds, ETFs, central banks, inflation, GDP, monetary policy, personal finance, compound interest, tax concepts, market indicators

Create MK_OS/ai_core/hre/knowledge_files/bulk_devops_cloud.mk - 400+ facts about DevOps/Cloud: Kubernetes, Terraform, Ansible, CI/CD, AWS/GCP/Azure services, microservices, service mesh, observability, SRE practices, GitOps, infrastructure as code

Create MK_OS/ai_core/hre/knowledge_files/bulk_physics_chemistry.mk - 400+ facts about physics and chemistry: quantum mechanics, relativity, thermodynamics, electromagnetism, organic chemistry, periodic table, chemical reactions, materials science, nuclear physics

Create MK_OS/ai_core/hre/knowledge_files/bulk_biology_medicine.mk - 400+ facts about biology and medicine: human anatomy, genetics, evolution, microbiology, pharmacology, diseases, immune system, neuroscience, cell biology, ecology

Create MK_OS/ai_core/hre/knowledge_files/bulk_history_politics.mk - 400+ facts about world history and politics: major civilizations, wars, revolutions, political systems, international organizations, human rights, constitutional law, geopolitics

Create MK_OS/ai_core/hre/knowledge_files/bulk_psychology_philosophy.mk - 300+ facts about psychology and philosophy: cognitive biases, personality theories, consciousness, ethics, logic, epistemology, major philosophers, behavioral economics, decision theory

Create MK_OS/ai_core/hre/knowledge_files/bulk_practical_skills.mk - 300+ facts about practical skills MK needs: project management, negotiation, communication, time management, productivity systems, writing, teaching, problem-solving frameworks

Create MK_OS/mind/autonomous_learner.cpp - Class MKAutonomousLearner implementing the idle-time learning loop. During low-activity periods: picks a topic with weak knowledge, calls Python web_scraper to gather facts, validates new facts against existing knowledge, integrates them into knowledge files, logs what was learned. Implements curiosity-driven exploration (picks topics adjacent to things MK was recently asked about).

Create MK_OS/mind/knowledge_validator.cpp - Class MKKnowledgeValidator that checks new facts for: consistency with existing knowledge (no contradictions), source reliability scoring, duplicate detection, proper formatting. Rejects facts that conflict with high-confidence existing facts.
Update pattern_graph.cpp loader to handle the increased number of knowledge files (ensure it scans the knowledge_files directory dynamically rather than hardcoded list)
acceptance_criteria: All new .mk files follow the source|relation|target|weight format correctly
Total knowledge base exceeds 15,000 facts across all .mk files
No duplicate facts within the same file
MKAutonomousLearner and MKKnowledgeValidator compile without errors
Pattern graph can load all new knowledge files without errors
findings: Total loaded facts after dedup: 15,007. Total .mk file lines: 17,146. 49 knowledge files scanned dynamically. Build: zero errors, 10 warnings (pre-existing). Tests: 11 passed, 0 failed, 160 assertions. The pattern_graph now uses opendir/readdir (dirent.h) for dynamic directory scanning. Some facts are deduplicated between new files and pre-existing bulk_philosophy_psychology.mk, bulk_medicine_health.mk etc. The autonomous_learner and knowledge_validator are compiled in but not yet wired into the main loop (they need an explicit idle-time trigger which can be added to the daemon jobs).
